summary: BuildRequest contains no explicit requirements; the diff only updates `project_state.json` to describe a restaurant inventory/order app feature set unrelated to “attempt production deployment again.” No requested requirements are missing, but the diff introduces unrequested product features in the project state metadata.

hallucinated_features.description: Introduces/updates project state summary and feature list for a restaurant inventory/order app (ingredients grouped by category, daily closing balances/next-day orders, history view, CSV export, theming, etc.), which is unrelated to the stated goal of attempting production deployment again.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest explicitly has “Requirements: none” and “Non-goals: Adding new product features unrelated to production deployment and verification.” The only modified file describes new/updated product features rather than deployment-related changes.
